name: Yanam River Walk
description: A beautifully landscaped promenade along the Gauthami Godavari River in the Yanam enclave of Puducherry. It features a massive replica of the Eiffel Tower.
history: Yanam is a former French colony surrounded geographically by Andhra Pradesh, retaining a unique Franco-Telugu heritage.
famousFor: Eiffel Tower replica, river boating, and serene evenings.
